Device Management

These routines are primarily used to access PortAudio device queries from Java. More...

int32 CSyn_GetMaxInputChannels (int32 devID)
 Get the maximum number of channels for this device.

int32 CSyn_DeviceIDToNameJava (int32 devID, char *targetText, int32 textSize)
 Get device name in a way useful to Java JNI.

Detailed Description

These routines are primarily used to access PortAudio device queries from Java.

Function Documentation

int32 CSyn_DeviceIDToNameJava (  int32  devID,
char *  targetText,
int32  textSize
) 
 

Get device name in a way useful to Java JNI.

Otherwise us PortAudio directly.

int32 CSyn_GetMaxInputChannels (  int32  devID  ) 
 

Get the maximum number of channels for this device.

Parameters:
devID PortAudio device ID.
